title: About | Sojan Joseph MP
meta_description: Find out more about our work, campaigns and how to help make our local area better for everyone.
text_excerpt: About | Sojan Joseph MP Find me on Facebook 01233 515107 Email Me HOME ABOUT About Me Parliamentary Record NEWS News Articles Newsletter Sign up Newsletters Press Releases Columns ENDORSERS & SUCCESSES Campaigns Missions USEFUL LINKS SURGERIES Coffee Morning HELP Contact Event Request Visit Parliament ABOUT Find out more about our work, campaigns and how to help make our local area better for everyone. ABOUT ME Sojan moved to Ashford from Kerala, India in 2002. He worked in the NHS for 22 years – primarily in mental health services – holding the roles of ward manager, matron, mental health nurse, and Head of Nursing for community mental health services in Kent and Medway. He joined the Labour Party in 2015 to oppose the Tory policy of austerity, especially the heavy cuts to public services, which he saw first-hand in his job whilst working in the NHS. He took on his first political role in 2023, after winning a seat on Ashford Borough Council to represent the Aylesford and East Stour ward. MY PRIORITIES Sojan decided to run for his local seat of Ashford in the 2024 election on a local platform of the following priorities: Fixing NHS services Improving high streets and boosting the local economy Creating pothole-free roads Bringing International Rail back to Ashford Being a local and accessible Member of Parliament Sojan is the first ever Labour Member of Parliament to represent the Ashford Constituency. He served on the Terminally Ill Adults (end of life) Bill Committee. He lives in Ashford with his wife and three children. GET IN TOUCH As your local MP there are a number of different things I can help you with or offer advice on, such as; benefits, immigration, tax issues, problems with the NHS, child maintenance and education matters. I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP for Ashford and what matters most to you. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me.
